rulings.Case Title: DOROTHY TILLMAN et al VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Directing San Francisco Sheriffs Department To Enforce The Writ Of Possession For The Premises At 1139 Market Street #228 In San Francisco, Ca
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 8, 2016, Line 3. DEFENDANT BALWANTSINH THAKOR Notice Of Motion For Order Directing San Francisco Sheriffs Department To Enforce The Writ Of Possession For The Premises At 1139 Market Street #228 In San Francisco, Ca. is GRANTED. Sherriff's Department shall enforce the writ issued by this Court within 5 days of notice of entry of the order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDWIN NEIL ACOSTA ET AL VS. SHERMAN LEUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To Be Excused From June 10, 2015 Order To Name Victor Pedroza As A Party
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 8, 2016, Line 5 ( Part 2 of 3). PLAINTIFF EDWIN ACOSTA, DAN SCHELLENBERG Amended Notice Of Motion To Be Excused From June 10, 2015 Order To Name Victor Pedroza As A Party is DENIED. Plaintiff shall comply with June 10, 2015 Order by no later than January 22, 2016 and file an amendment to complaint joining Victor Pedroza and serving Victor Pedroza. Plaintiff shall file declaration re: compliance no later than January 25, 2016 by 4:00 p.m. =(501/REQ)
